streams.name: Stream 1 – Discovery & Research
streams.achieved:
Completed initial stakeholder interviews
Drafted research synthesis themes
Shared early findings with project sponsor
streams.next:
Validate themes in user workshop
Finalise research report
Begin opportunity prioritisation

streams.name: Stream 2 – Solution Design
streams.achieved:
Concept sketches reviewed in design crit
Usability heuristics agreed with team
streams.next:
Build clickable prototype
Schedule first round of user testing

streams.name: Stream 3 – Build & Delivery (with Project Dev / Governance split)
streams.achievedProjectDev:
Backend API endpoints scaffolded
Front-end component library updated
First integration tests passing
streams.achievedGovernance:
Risk register reviewed at steering committee
Change request log updated
streams.nextProjectDev:
Implement priority feature set for sprint 4
Tighten test coverage on new endpoints
streams.nextGovernance:
Prepare materials for next steering committee
Confirm go-live readiness criteria with sponsor

streams.name: Stream 4 – Change & Communications
streams.achieved:
Communications plan endorsed
FAQ drafted for end-user audience
streams.next:
Publish FAQ to intranet
Run first awareness session for impacted teams
